# Prototype Report

## Hypothesis
What question was this prototype designed to answer?

## Implementation
- **Duration**: How long did it take?
- **Approach**: Key technical decisions

## Results
What did we learn? Include metrics, observations, and surprises.

## Verdict
- [ ] Hypothesis validated — proceed to production design
- [ ] Hypothesis invalidated — do not pursue this direction
- [ ] Inconclusive — needs further iteration

## Recommendations
What should the production implementation do differently?
